title: October 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}
'''October 29''' is the 302nd day of the year (303rd in leap years). There are 63 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Adam Bareham]] is born.
*[[1995]] – ''[[The Lost Jedi Adventure Game Book]]'' published.
*[[1997]] – [[Dark Force Rising 6|''Dark Force Rising'' 6]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Mythmaking: Behind the Scenes of Attack of the Clones]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – [[Legacy (2006) 29|''Legacy'' (2006) 29]] published.
*2008 – [[Star Wars: Rebellion: Volume 3: Small Victories|''Rebellion: Volume 3: Small Victories'']] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Annihilation]]'' paperback published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars: Assault Team]]'' shuts down.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Forces of Destiny: Volume 2]]'' published.
*2017 – "[[Accidental Allies]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Lost Stars, Vol. 3]]'' published in the US.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 8]]'' published. 
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic: The Lightsaber Collection]]'' published in the UK.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The 25 Year Anniversary Special Edition]]'' published.
*2024 – [[Star Wars Insider 228|''Star Wars Insider'' 228]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Star Wars: Visions Volume 3|''Star Wars: Visions'' Volume 3]] premiered on [[Disney+]].
*2025 – [[Boba Fett — Black, White & Red 2|''Boba Fett — Black, White & Red'' 2]] published.
*2025 – [[Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent 5|''Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent'' 5]] published.
